title: × lophiocirsium gerhardtii
intro: × Lophiocirsium gerhardtii, also known as the Japanese fern or Gerhardt's lophiocirsium, is a species of fern that belongs to the family of Cirsiiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. × Lophiocirsium gerhardtii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional medicine in some parts of Asia.
